name: Center Pocket Straight Shot
description: Straight shot into the side pocket. Focus on center-ball hit and follow-through.

name: Short Straight Shot
description: Short straight shot into the corner pocket. Build confidence with easy pots.

name: Long Straight Shot
description: Full-length straight shot into the corner. Keep your cue as level as possible.

name: Off-Center Straight
description: Straight shot slightly off-center into the corner. Aim through the ball, not at the pocket.

name: Gauntlet 1/5
description: First ball - short straight into the corner. Smooth stroke.

name: Gauntlet 2/5
description: Second ball - leave the cue ball rolling forward.

name: Gauntlet 3/5
description: Third ball - staying on the center line.

name: Gauntlet 4/5
description: Fourth ball - keep it straight and controlled.

name: Gauntlet 5/5
description: Final ball - pot it clean into the corner.
